visual_base.visual_narrative_log: (1) (0:00-0:02) Close-up shot showing the Google logo and a search bar on a grey background. A red text banner at the bottom reads "Google搜尋引擎". A male character wearing a grey sweater and a flat cap is visible in a circular inset in the bottom right corner. (2) (0:02-0:10) Transition to a medium shot of the male character (3cTim) in a studio setting. He wears a grey sweatshirt, a textured flat cap, and glasses. He gesticulates actively with both hands. Logos for "3c有趣思tim哥" and "miko" are displayed at the top. (3) (0:10-0:25) Screen recording of the ChatGPT interface. The text "What can I help with?" is shown. A cursor types a search query into the message box. The male character continues speaking in the bottom-right circular inset. (4) (0:25-0:32) Quick cut to a graphic showing a magnifying glass over the Google logo, followed by a switch back to the ChatGPT UI. The ChatGPT screen displays a map of New York and a business result for "Sushi Nakazawa". (5) (0:32-0:42) Detailed view of the ChatGPT search results including a map, photos, and a description of the restaurant. The male character in the inset continues to explain the interface. (6) (0:42-0:44) Brief montage of b-roll footage: a digital 3D globe with network lines, followed by a man in a lab wearing a VR headset. The lighting is bright and technical. (7) (0:44-0:52) Screen recording of a webpage titled "ChatGPT 搜尋簡介" with a clean white background and blue accents. The male character asks a final question to the audience from his inset position.
visual_base.text_narrative_log: (1) [Subtitle]: Google搜尋引擎. [Logo]: 3c有趣思tim哥. [Logo]: @3ctim. [Logo]: miko. (2) [Subtitle]: 霸主引擎地位不保!?. [Subtitle]: OpenAI 宣布. [Subtitle]: 開放 ChatGPT 社群的搜尋功能. [Variety]: 讓所有人免費使用. (3) [Subtitle]: 也就是說. [Subtitle]: 你不用註冊登入就能用了. [Subtitle]: 外界認為這項宣布. [Subtitle]: 讓搜尋方法進入了. [Subtitle]: 新的一個競爭的階段. (4) [Subtitle]: 因為比起以往的搜尋引擎來講. [Subtitle]: ChatGPT 有獨特對話式搜索. [Subtitle]: 更能去抓住我們的使用者的需求. (5) [Subtitle]: 而且還可以抓到網絡的. [Subtitle]: 一個脈絡資訊進行分析. [Subtitle]: 不像傳統的搜尋引擎啊. [Subtitle]: 只能用關鍵字來做一個匹配. (6) [Subtitle]: 讓使用者還要一個一個. [Subtitle]: 去找到答案. [Subtitle]: 相對的 ChatGPT 目前是受到訓練數據的影響. (7) [Subtitle]: 導致部分的資訊的準確度. [Subtitle]: 還是會有點落差. [Subtitle]: 所以我們使用者. [Subtitle]: 可能要再三確認一下. [Subtitle]: 這個資訊的可靠性. (8) [Subtitle]: 不過現階段使用. [Subtitle]: ChatGPT 的搜尋引擎. [Subtitle]: 還沒有討人厭的廣告. [Subtitle]: 這也是影響了使用者的體驗. [Subtitle]: 這也算是它優點之一. [Subtitle]: 你想用用看嗎?

visual_human_presence.countingEvidence: 1 main creator (3cTim) throughout the video, and 1 man wearing a VR headset in a brief b-roll shot.
visual_human_presence.mainCharacterDescription: An adult male with glasses, wearing a grey crewneck sweatshirt and a grey/brown textured flat cap.

visual_scene_and_style.backgroundDescribe: A solid light-grey studio wall for the speaker segments; white and dark-themed digital UI for the search engine screen recordings; a lab-like environment for the VR b-roll.

audio_base.audio_narrative_log: (1) (0:00-0:10) A male voice begins an energetic narration with high vocal arousal and clear articulation. The background features an upbeat electronic pop track with a strong synth bass and percussive rhythm at approximately 124 BPM. The vocal delivery is authoritative yet friendly. (2) (0:10-0:11) A sharp digital 'click' sound effect triggers a transition in the narration as the speaker shifts focus to the ChatGPT interface. The BGM remains steady in the mix. (3) (0:11-0:25) The narration continues with a high speech density, explaining features of AI search. A subtle digital UI 'ping' is heard as the cursor interacts with the screen. The music tempo and volume are consistent. (4) (0:25-0:26) A quick 'whoosh' sound effect accompanies a visual cut. The speaker's tone remains consistent in pitch and intensity. (5) (0:26-0:42) The professional narration continues at a fast pace. The BGM provides a rhythmic foundation without masking the vocals. Another digital 'ding' occurs when information cards appear on screen. (6) (0:42-0:52) The narration concludes with a slight rising pitch contour in the final question. The music track undergoes a short, clean fade-out at the very end of the clip.

narrative_and_purpose.mainPurpose: The video aims to inform viewers about OpenAI's new search features for ChatGPT, positioning it as a potentially superior alternative to traditional Google searches due to its conversational context and lack of ads. It provides a quick tutorial and comparative analysis to encourage user adoption.

endorsement_analysis.endorsementCues: A persistent logo for 'miko' is present throughout the video, and the creator is a well-known tech influencer (3cTim) who often collaborates with retail brands.

high_inference.freeDescribe: A high-production-value tech commentary video using multi-layer visual layouts (PIP) and crisp audio to maintain high engagement.
